description: Style Notegiorgio armani has created this opulent floral fragrance Idole d& rsquo Armani with an unpredictable inspiration from the Orient and timeless Italian elegance. The top notes include bitter orange, juicy pear, ginger and davana notes with rose loukoum, jasmine and saffron absolute at the heart. At the base are luminous and sensual styrax, patchouli and vetiver, making it a perfect fragrance for the bold and the beautiful. Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
